creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #14)

The core error seems to be ENFILE (Too many open files in system):
> [java] Caused by: java.nio.file.FileSystemException: /tmp/imageio19870471739360284.tmp: Too many open files

You need to increase kern.maxfiles in /boot/loader.conf
I have kern.maxfiles="25000", and it passes for me in 11.0-RELEASE-p7.
